prompt: A highly detailed cinematic third-person wuxia MMORPG gameplay screenshot set in a bustling ancient Chinese water-town market street at dusk, viewed from behind the player character standing in the center foreground. The player character is a wandering swordsman in layered dark gray and blue hanfu-style robes with embroidered fabric, long black hair tied in a low ponytail, and a sheathed sword on his back, facing forward into a crowded street. The environment is a richly rendered Ming- or Song-inspired town with traditional wooden shopfronts, tiled roofs, hanging red lanterns, pink cherry blossom trees, damp reflective stone pavement, soft golden evening light, and a lived-in crowd of townsfolk in historical clothing. On the right foreground, exactly 3 elegant female courtesans in translucent pastel hanfu sit and stand outside a richly decorated teahouse or brothel draped with red silk curtains; one is playing a pipa, one is seated in pale green and cream robes, and one stands in flowing rose-pink robes. The largest shop sign above them features large gold Chinese calligraphy on a black plaque, and additional vertical shop banners with Chinese characters hang along the street. The composition should feel like a premium AAA fantasy Chinese RPG, with realistic character proportions, dense environmental storytelling, dramatic but natural lighting, atmospheric depth, and intricate costume materials. Include a complete game HUD overlay in Chinese: top left circular character portrait with level 36 and 2 horizontal bars for health and mana; a left-side quest tracker panel with exactly 4 quest entries under tabbed headings; a bottom left semi-transparent chat box with multiple lines of Chinese world chat; a top right circular minimap with location text; a right-side vertical menu with exactly 6 icon buttons; a bottom center skill bar with exactly 10 slots including 8 square skill icons plus 2 circular end slots labeled with keyboard keys; and a bottom menu row with exactly 6 navigation icons. Ultra-detailed, photorealistic fantasy game interface mockup, polished UI, immersive crowded street scene, 16:9 aspect ratio.
